title: marrubium bourgaei subsp. bourgaei
intro: Marrubium bourgaei subsp. bourgaei, also known as Bourgaia or Marrubium bourgaei, is a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Marrubium bourgaei subsp. bourgaei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
